Package umm.digiquilt.model

Interface Summary
Challenge An interface for Challenges, which can see if a Block fulfills the challenge or not.
 

Class Summary
Block The block is the main work area for the program.
DefaultGrids.GridDivision A wrapper class to encapsulate a set of Grids under a certain label.
Fraction  
FractionChallenge  
FreeformChallenge A challenge which matches any Block.
Grid This is a holder for all the GridLine (s) to be displayed in the Grid.
Patch A patch is one "square" of the main block.
 

Enum Summary
DefaultGrids Static methods to get the predefined Grid used by the Select A Grid panel.
Fabric An enum representing all the possible fabric colors.
Shape Enum for the shapes that are offered in the Shape Selector.
